voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: Morning in Sherward's memory was not quiet.

voice_keys.speaker: Sebastian
voice_keys.text: You leave this house as my son, not as a runaway chasing legends.

voice_keys.speaker: Sherward
voice_keys.text: I will not spend my life hiding while Krimora takes more from us.

voice_keys.speaker: Sebastian
voice_keys.text: Pride is quick to speak and slow to bury the dead.

voice_keys.speaker: Sherward
voice_keys.text: I leave at dawn, and I return only when fear no longer rules us.

voice_keys.speaker: Narrator
voice_keys.text: The memory breaks. The world returns.

tutorial_banners.text_default: Walk a few steps and center the camera before pushing deeper into the valley.
Open the Journal to read Characters, Locations, Events, and Factions as they unlock.
Look at NPCs or threats in your reticle to register them in the Codex.

events.title: Opening Memory: Morning Argument
events.details: Sherward remembers his dawn conflict with his father Sebastian before setting out.

characters.title: Sherward
characters.details: Protagonist whose journey begins with a vow to leave home and face Krimora.

characters.title: Sebastian
characters.details: Sherward's father. Stern, protective, and marked by older losses.

characters.title: Adalin
characters.details: Core narrative figure tied to Sherward's main arc.

locations.title: Sherward Homestead
locations.details: The household where the opening memory takes place.

locations.title: Krimora Borderlands
locations.details: A feared region whose pressure shapes Sherward's resolve.

factions.title: House Sherward
factions.details: Family line carrying duty, grief, and contested expectations.

factions.title: Krimora Forces
factions.details: Hostile influence driving unrest across nearby lands.
